title: How can i copy something from the main item to its subitem?
excerpt: I am trying to copy a generated user name on the top level item down to each sub item. Each item has 3 sub items that all need the same user name field applied at that level. I cant seem to find a way to connect the two …

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to copy a generated user name on the top level item down to each sub item. Each item has 3 sub items that all need the same user name field applied at that level. I cant seem to find a way to connect the two things and keep them in sync.

posts.author: kindertech (KinderTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jpelrman87, unfortunately Monday doesn’t have that available in their automations, my company uses Make (automation development app) that integrates seamlessly with Monday and is fairly easy to implement. It’s not ideal but for us it covers almost everything Monday doesn’t have inherently available. Let me know if you’d like help setting it up if you are interested.

Nathan Kind (nathan@kinder-technologies.com)
Lead Software Consultant - Kinder Tech
